title: 512-step screening baseline refresh

queries: stage3 screening baseline refresh test subset variance 512
test subset selection variance baseline rerun graph llm 512

evidence.why_now: The Stage 3 screening protocol was revised to 512 evaluation/test-subset steps as the new efficiency-stability compromise. The old 128-step strict baselines and the cancelled 4096-step refresh are both protocol-mismatched for future candidate judgment.

hypothesis: No model change. Rerunning the current Stage 2 merged line under the new 512-step screening protocol should produce the protocol-matched strict baselines for the next Stage 3 candidate round.
notes: This bundle is for protocol refresh only.
Do not judge it against the old 128-step strict baselines.
Use its final subset-test metrics to replace screening_baseline_metrics in baseline_registry.json.
Completed on 2026-05-05 and used to refresh the 512-step strict screening baselines.
